name: Frittata William
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Land of Lakes Roasted Garlic Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the roasted garlic butter in a medium size oven-proof skillet over medium heat.
2. Saute the prosciutto, salami, and parsley for a minute or two.
3. Add the cooked potatoes and sauté another minute.
4. Reduce the heat to medium-low.
5. In a bowl, beat the eggs, water, and Locatelli cheese together.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the sauteed items in the skillet.
7. Cook over medium-low heat for 15 minutes.
8. Remove from stove top burner and place skillet under broiler until brown on top.
9. Slide the frittata out of the skillet and onto a serving dish.
10. Garnish with sliced wine-cured Italian black olives.
